name: Ripjaw
bio: A feral engine of hunger, Ripjaw exists only to feast — and in his wake, only gnawed bones remain.

skills.name: Bite
skills.description: Deal Physical Damage equal to (160% of Attack Damage + 300 + 30% of opponent's max HP). Damage increases by 40% additively per stack of Starve. Consumes all stacks.

skills.name: Starve
skills.description: Permanently increase Attack Damage and Magic Power by 8% (additively). Gain 1 stack of Starve. Enhances other abilities and is consumed when used.

skills.name: Devour
skills.description: Deal Magical Damage equal to (120% Attack Damage + 100), and heal for (15% Magic Power + 50). Permanently increase Armor by 6% and Magic Resist by 10%. Effects scale with Starve stacks (damage +40%, heal +60%, defenses +25% per stack). Consumes all stacks.

skills.name: Chew
skills.description: Deal (36% of Attack Damage + 30) Physical Damage six times. Damage increases by 50% additively per Starve stack. Consumes all stacks.

ultimate.name: Swallow
ultimate.description: If opponent's HP is below 40% of user's Attack Damage (max 800), instantly kill them. Otherwise, deal Magical Damage equal to (190% Attack Damage + 50% of opponent's lost HP), increased by 30% per Starve stack. Consumes all stacks.
